summary: Iteration 14: Sidebar reorganization (6 sections) and Resend email notifications tested. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All sidebar sections and menu items verified. Reminder buttons work but Resend free tier rejects non-verified emails (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar correctly organized into 6 sections: PILOTAGE, MEMBRES, ACTIVITÉ, PROGRAMMES, COMPTABILITÉ, CONFIGURATION
All 16 menu items properly placed under their respective sections
Sidebar toggle (data-testid='sidebar-toggle') works correctly for collapse/expand
Resend integration is live - POST /api/notifications/send-email works for verified email only
Payment reminder buttons (data-testid='reminder-{id}') visible in Payments > En retard tab
Review reminder buttons (data-testid='reminder-{id}') visible in Bilans / Suivis for scheduled reviews
Notification logs properly track sent emails via GET /api/notifications/logs
NOTE: Resend free tier limitation - only antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro can receive emails. Other recipients get 500 error (expected)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 late payment and 1 scheduled review for member 'Camille Roux' to test reminder buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar has 6 grouped sections working. Email notifications work via Resend but only to verified email (antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro). Test data created: payment b8627eda-73f1-46d8-99cd-f46462df5a9b (late), review 02092832-df2d-49e7-bc00-71712c33fd78 (scheduled). Old annual_reviews linked to non-existent member f44d7b30 - these show in stats but not in table.
